title: Contains Duplicate
description:
Given an integer array `nums`, return `true` if any value appears **at
least twice** in the array, and return `false` if every element is distinct.

solutions.summary: Track seen values; a repeat means a duplicate exists.

steps.title: Build a set of seen values
steps.explanation: Keep a hash set of every value we have already encountered.

steps.title: Return early on a repeat
steps.explanation: Before adding a value, check whether it is already in the set. If it is, we found a duplicate and can return immediately.

solutions.summary: Sort the array; duplicates become adjacent neighbours.

steps.title: Sort the array
steps.explanation: After sorting, any duplicate values sit next to each other, so a single linear scan can find them.

steps.title: Compare adjacent neighbours
steps.explanation: Walk the sorted array and compare each element with the previous one. Equal neighbours mean a duplicate.
